title: JSON dump missing output ports on v5.042

features.name: top_module_output_port_via_assign_missing_in_json
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with an output port driven by an assign statement from an internal wire, where the internal wire is driven by a DFF instance output

features.name: top_module_output_direct_instance_connection
features.description: Code should include a top-level module where an output port is passed directly to an instance output port (this pattern works correctly in JSON dump, contrasting with assign-based connections)
